texto: Get into the habit of looking for the silver lining of the cloud and when you have found it continue to look at it rather than at the leaden gray in the middle. It will help you over many hard places.
explicacao: Citação de A. A. Willitts sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Get into the habit of looking for the silver lining of the cloud and when you have found it conti…” articula reflexao, paz, habit em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
